question: What was my previous frequent flyer status on United Airlines before I got the current status?

retrieval_results.context:
The user holds United Airlines MileagePlus Premier Gold status
User has a United Airlines MileagePlus account
User would earn approximately 3,698 miles on a round‑trip United flight from Washington D.C. to San Francisco as a Premier Gold member
User would need approximately 10-15 months of 2-3 flights per month to reach Premier Platinum status
The user will travel from Washington Dulles International Airport (IAD) to San Francisco International Airport (SFO) on United Airlines
User plans to set up price alerts for United flight price drops
